description_long: This is a rustic log cabin constructed primarily from large, rounded timber logs, giving it a robust and traditional appearance. The cabin features a prominent gable roof with deep overhangs and brown shingle cladding, providing ample protection from the elements. The front facade is characterized by two large rectangular windows flanking a central log column, set above a stone foundation and a paved stone walkway. The rear side of the cabin includes a covered porch area with exposed timber beams and a wooden floor, offering a sheltered outdoor space. The windows are symmetrically arranged, and the overall structure sits on a rectangular base with a mix of stone, wood, and grassy landscaping. The architectural style and materials evoke a classic log cabin suitable for residential use in a natural or suburban setting.
description: A traditional log cabin with a gable roof, large timber logs, symmetrical windows, and a covered rear porch set on a stone and grassy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large rectangular windows, a central log column, stone foundation, and paved walkway.
description_view_1: Side/top view highlighting the deep roof overhang, partial stone walkway, and grassy landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a covered porch with exposed beams, wooden flooring, and symmetrical window placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side/top view showing the roof's extension, stone foundation, and grassy area adjacent to the cabin.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with deep overhangs and brown asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Two large rectangular windows symmetrically placed on the front facade, with additional windows visible on the sides; all windows are vertically oriented and evenly spaced.
attribute_door_placement: A single exterior door is located at the rear, centered under the covered porch area.
